title: iris pseudocaucasica subsp. koyuncui
intro: Iris pseudocaucasica subsp. koyuncui, also known as the Koyuncu Iris, is a subspecies of the Iris pseudocaucasica plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. The Koyuncu Iris has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The Koyuncu Iris can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in a tincture or salve form, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further scientific investigation and validation.
